data.name: Sloppy Fields
data.detailed_description:
Sloppy Fields is a cozy idle farming game where you manage a farm in a field full of horny creatures.

Make sure to keep a good balance between days in the fields, and days in the sheets, and try to pay your huge debt to the IRS.



After their father's disappearance, Nico and Leo inherit their father's old farm, where a cast of colorful monster girls and other kinds of companions reside.
The two brothers will soon realize that, to become great farmers, they will have to sacrifice their backs (and their hip bones)



  • A Cozy and laid-back farm-management experience.

  • Many hand-painted pixel art scenarios and characters.

  • 5 races of animals to breed and sell, coming with 5 farming biomes as well.

  • Farming skills to upgrade and automate your farm's efficiency.

  • Various high quality pixel art animations.
data.about_the_game:
Sloppy Fields is a cozy idle farming game where you manage a farm in a field full of horny creatures.

Make sure to keep a good balance between days in the fields, and days in the sheets, and try to pay your huge debt to the IRS.



After their father's disappearance, Nico and Leo inherit their father's old farm, where a cast of colorful monster girls and other kinds of companions reside.
The two brothers will soon realize that, to become great farmers, they will have to sacrifice their backs (and their hip bones)



  • A Cozy and laid-back farm-management experience.

  • Many hand-painted pixel art scenarios and characters.

  • 5 races of animals to breed and sell, coming with 5 farming biomes as well.

  • Farming skills to upgrade and automate your farm's efficiency.

  • Various high quality pixel art animations.
data.short_description: After his disappearance, you've inherited your father's old farm and a huge debt. The farm is located in the Sloppy Fields: legendary lands where nature grows strong and where monster girls are proliferous. Will you be able to conquer these lands once again and pay your debt?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
